account.avatarDescription: Click the circle or drop an image to it to upload your avatar.
account.name: Name

onboarding.message: Just a few quick steps to get you started.

notifications.accountSetupFailed: We are sorry, but we were unable to set up your account. Please try again later.

pricing.planSelected: Your plan has been selected successfully.

onboarding.title: Set up your account

createIndex.title: Create your first search index
createIndex.description: Give your index a name. You can add documents and configure the schema afterwards.
createIndex.slugHint: Lowercase letters, digits and dashes only
createIndex.error: Failed to create index. Please try again.
createIndex.noOrg: Please create an organization first before setting up a search index.

addDocuments.title: Import your first documents
addDocuments.description: Paste a JSON array of objects to seed your index. You can import more documents later.
addDocuments.parseError: Invalid JSON. Please paste a valid array of objects.
addDocuments.error: Failed to import documents. Please try again.

installWidget.title: Embed the search widget
installWidget.description: Copy the snippet below and paste it into your website's HTML to add the search widget.

apiKey.title: Get your API key
apiKey.description: Create a search API key to integrate AACsearch into your application. Copy it — it won't be shown again.
apiKey.error: Failed to create API key. Please try again.

choosePlan.title: Choose your plan
choosePlan.description: To continue, please select a plan.

checkoutReturn.title: Processing your purchase
checkoutReturn.description: Please wait while we confirm your payment.

start.subtitle: See the latest stats of your awesome business.
